div1.entryFree: Itch, vb. to feel that uneasiness in the skin which is removed by scratching: my elbow --ed; I thought there would a scab follow, Ado III, 3, 106. Troil. II, 1, 29. mine eyes do i.; doth that bode weeping? Oth. IV, 3, 58. Hence == to have a teasing desire: a tailor might scratch her where'er she did i. Tp. II, 2, 55. an --ing palm, Caes. IV, 3, 10. my finger --es to make one, Wiv. II, 3, 48. my fingers i. == I have a great mind to strike: Troil. II, 1, 28. Rom. III, 5, 165.
